message:
Fix MTTR badge size to match other badges (#11136)

Remove style=for-the-badge so the MTTR badge uses the default flat style,
matching the coverage, ACMM, and OpenSSF badges.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch:
